cluster.description:
ComputeCluster resource ID that this daemon runs on for Horizon-backed
cloud platforms. Kubernetes and Local runtimes ignore this field.

binaryName.description: Name of the binary to build and run

oneOf.description: TypeScript/JavaScript compiled to single executable with Bun

binaryName.description: Name of the compiled binary (defaults to package.json name if not specified)

toolchain.description:
Configuration for different programming language toolchains.
Each toolchain provides type-safe build configuration and auto-detection capabilities.

command.description: Command to override the image default.

cpu.description: CPU resource requirements for each daemon instance.

oneOf.description: HTTP health check for public daemon endpoint load balancers.

failureThreshold.description: Number of consecutive failures before marking replica unhealthy

method.description: HTTP method to use for health check

port.description: Port to check (defaults to container port if not specified)

items.description:
New ResourceRef that works with any resource type.
This can eventually replace the enum-based ResourceRef for full extensibility.

type.description: Resource type identifier that determines the specific kind of resource. This field is used for polymorphic deserialization and resource-specific behavior.

memory.description: Memory resource requirements for each daemon instance.

pool.description: Capacity group/pool to run on for backends that expose machine pools.

items.description: Public endpoint configuration shared by workload resources.

hostLabel.description: Optional DNS label override for generated endpoint hostnames.

port.description: Workload port served by the public endpoint.

wildcardSubdomains.description: Whether to route wildcard subdomains to this endpoint.

ports.description: Public endpoints exposed by the daemon.
